name: email-finder
title: Email Finder - Free B2B Contact Scraper (Hunter.io & Snov.io Alternative)
description: Free Hunter.io, Snov.io & FindThatLead alternative. Find email addresses, phone numbers, and social media links from any website. Two scan depths: homepage-only (fast) or deep scan (contact, about, team pages). Extracts company info from JSON-LD structured data. Bulk URL processing, JSON/CSV export. No API keys, no subscription. Pay-per-use from $0.01/domain. Perfect for B2B lead generation, sales prospecting, and business directory enrichment.
